summary: Iteration 3 — responsive + creative redesign pass verified end-to-end. Backend untouched, 7/7 pytest tests pass (health, profile shape, github repos, contact POST valid + invalid email 422 + missing fields 422, GET list). Frontend verified at 1440x900 / 820x1180 / 390x844: all NEW testids render (hero-status-pill, whoami-terminal with all 5 cmds whoami/cat current.role/ls stack/echo $LOCATION/cat open_to.txt and prompt '~/deepak ❯', contact-signal with LIVE pill + NOW SHIPPING rotator + 4 contact-signal-* rows). Animated counters resolve to expected final values (+40%, 99.9%, 10,000+, -25%) on all viewports. Hero 3D scene visible only at desktop (lg+), correctly hidden at tablet/mobile (heroVisible=false at 820 & 390). No horizontal scroll at any breakpoint (scrollWidth == clientWidth at 1440/820/390). All regression testids preserved (hero-headline, hero-contact-button/github-link/resume-button, nav-link-* (5), project-card-* (4), award-item-pat/collab/hack, contact-form + contact-form-{name,email,subject,message} + contact-submit, experience-timeline, skills-3d-canvas). Contact form end-to-end submission returns success banner with text 'Message received. I'll get back within 24 hours.'
critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedCounter formats values >=100 with toLocaleString (so 10000 → '10,000+') and values <100 with toFixed honoring decimals (99.9 stays as 99.9, 40 as 40) — verified working on all viewports.

Hero 3D canvas is correctly gated behind `hidden lg:block` so it never overlaps CTAs on mobile/tablet, and the grid fallback (linear-gradient) provides texture without overhead — clean implementation.

ContactSignal generates testids from row labels via .toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-'); resulting testids contact-signal-status, contact-signal-reply-window, contact-signal-time-zone, contact-signal-best-fit all match spec.
WhoamiTerminal uses setTimeout chain via state — reveal completes in ~2.4s (5 lines × ~520ms + initial 250ms). Test waited 3.5s after scroll-into-view to confirm full reveal.
Minor: Hero `data-testid=hero-section` is set on the section but the spec doesn't require it — extra coverage, no issue.

Minor: NOW SHIPPING rotator inline animation uses Tailwind arbitrary value `animate-[fadeIn_0.5s_ease-out]` — requires a corresponding @keyframes fadeIn in CSS to actually animate (visually it does fade-swap in screenshots so it's wired). No functional impact.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_FE_* contact message inserted during contact form submission regression (in addition to prior iterations' TEST_* entries). Safe to purge by name prefix TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend unchanged from iteration 2 (7/7 pytest tests pass). New testids introduced in iteration 3: hero-status-pill (Hero), whoami-terminal (About), contact-signal + contact-signal-{status|reply-window|time-zone|best-fit} (Contact). Hero 3D canvas is hidden below lg breakpoint (1024px). KPIs use AnimatedCounter with IntersectionObserver — to assert final values reliably, scroll the KPI rail into view and wait ~2s for the easeOutCubic 1.4s animation. Removed in iter 3: old about-info 2x2 tiles and contact response-time/availability 2-up — do NOT test them. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' + ~2s; networkidle hangs because of continuous WebGL animation on desktop.
